title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running large language models locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, published on PyPI as ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, available on npm as ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration enabling Ollama models as LLM components in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI) that supports chat, model management, and RAG.

title: open-webui
summary: Successor to ollama-webui: extensible, self-hosted AI interface for Ollama and OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial Rust-based CLI for chatting with Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot that proxies chats to a local Ollama instance with per-user model choice.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama published to Maven Central; supports streaming and embeddings.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team; use local models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-driven recipes for deploying, benchmarking, and extending Ollama in production.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: NVIDIA GPU-optimized container images and Helm charts for running Ollama on Jetson & CUDA rigs.

title: ollama-models
summary: Curated Modelfile collection (Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, etc.) with quantization notes and pull commands.

title: ollama-dify
summary: Dify integration letting you register Ollama models as custom LLMs in the Dify prompt IDE.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate (crates.io: ollama-rs) for chatting, embedding, and listing models.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed chat and embedding APIs, published on NuGet.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node selectors.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that streams Ollama completions into threads with slash commands.
